system.description:
Historical Curiosity

This gauntlet is made out of crow beaks. Each beak is carved with arcane symbols. Consulting Whispers officially report it does not have any power in the Ghost Field. It was made by the Spirit Warden who first tamed the deathseeker crows; he claimed it was a treaty that guaranteed their service.

Spirit Wardens lost this gauntlet decades ago, but they want it back. The idea it is a treaty with the deathseeker crows is probably nonsense. They can't take that chance.
